full_text:
Chou Lian 仇連
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chou Lian (仇連). Advised Sima Yi to camp on the hills and was executed for disobeying an order. Chou Lian is a fictional character. Chou Lian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chou Lian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
